query:
update certificates set
            serial = $1,
            dn = $2,
            country = $3,
            state = $4,
            locality = $5,
            organization = $6,
            organizational_unit = $7,
            common_name = $8,
            not_before = $9,
            not_after = $10,
            der = $11,
            issuer_certificate_id = $12,
            is_ca = $13,
            trusted = $14,
            subject_key_id = $15
        where id = $16
